CONTACTID.TEXT: Hello Ranger, you called for backup. How can I help
Hi. Thanks for responding up here. The construction workers called 911 when they found this driver on the road.
Okay. Cars aren't supposed to be on this road, so do we know what caused it?
According to them, a car did cause it. Ask for yourself.
Up here? What the hell is a car doing up here? I will talk to the workers, see if they can tell me anything else about it.
That is all I have for you!
Hello Guys. My name is {0} from the {1}. Please describe what happened.
Hi Officer. Will the biker be okay?. It looks bad for him, doesn't it?
Paramedics try to stabilize him. We need to see. Please focus on the accident. What happened?
Ah yes sorry. We are performing roadwork here, 'cause the rain washed away parts of this trail. We found him unconscious.
Do you know anything that could cause his crash?
There is one guy who is frequently up here with his car off-roading. But I can't tell you anything about the car.
Try talking to my buddy here. He might know something I don't.
Hello. Your buddy said you might know something about a possible vehicle?
Yes officer. I didn't see the accident, but when I came up here with my truck, a car was going down.
Can you tell me something about the driver? Car?
~w~ came rushing down the hill. It looked like he was fleeing from something. Then we found the victim.
PLACEHOLDER
PLACEHOLDER
Thanks for your information. Your help is extremely useful in this investigation.
No problem! Glad that we were up here. Hope the guy makes it.
Sorry, but that's all I can tell you.
Hello Officer, did you request backup?
Yes, I did. We have a hit and run. Until now, the victim was in shock, and I haven't been able to talk to him. Can you attempt to speak to the victim while I assist the paramedics?
Yeah, no problem. Hopefully he can tell us something.
Will do. Good luck, officer!
That is all I have for you!
Hello Sir, I'm a police officer. Can you tell me anything you remember about the accident? Car, person driving, anything?
Uuhh, I don't feel good... I think that... oh... I can't tell you anything.
He appears to be suffering from a pretty serious concussion.
Huh, he could be suffering from short term memory loss. Sir, are you sure you can't remember anything? Just the slightest thing can help.
I think.. I think I'm gunna pass out..
Officer, he just blacked out. The lady over there made the 911 call. Try talking to her!
That is all I have for you.
Hello Ma'am. I'm from the {0}. Did you see what happened here?
Hi Officer. Yes, I did. A car cut the corner at a high rate of speed and hit the poor man. Is he going to be okay?
He should be. Do you have a description of the vehicle or the driver?
. Dang, that person must be desperate.
Did you see the license plate of the
I believe so. I think it was
Thanks for your help. Your information is extremely useful in this investigation.
Glad to help!
Hey Partner, did you request backup? How can I help?
Hi bud, thanks for the fast response. We have a hit and run. I haven't been able to talk to the victim. Can you attempt to speak to her while I secure the scene?
Yeah, sure. Hopefully she remembers something.
I don't think so, she seems to be pretty messed up after the crash.
That is all I can tell you!
Hi Ma'am, I'm a police officer. Do you remember anything about the accident? A car, person driving, anything?
Ehmm.. sorry officer.. I ... I don't know.. where am I?
She is suffering from a pretty serious concussion caused by an airbag failing to open.
She must have hit her head very hard on the dashboard. Miss, are you sure you can't remember anything?
What time is it? What happend? Where am I ?
Officer, please stop questioning. Try talking to the security guard over there. He called 911.
That is all I have for you.
Hello Sir. I'm officer {0} of the {1}. Do you know what happened?
Hi Officer. Yes, I saw the accident. I was driving to the labs when a car came into the other lane. How is the woman doing?
She is facing memory loss. Do you have a description of the vehicle or the driver?
. The car came here often.. always at a high rate of speed.
Do you remember the license plate of the
Yep. I wrote it down. It was
Thanks for your help. Your information is extremely useful in this investigation.
Did you know that I always wanted to be a cop... anyway, glad to help!
Hi, you called in backup. What can I do for you?
Hi buddy. Do me a favor and talk to the victim and witness. I was busy getting the scene safe and calling in EMS
Sure, no problem. The victim looks disoriented. Hope he remembers something
Yeah, he hit the barrier pretty hard. You'll see.
That is all I can tell you!
Hi Sir, I'm a police officer from the {0}. Can you remember anything?
What? .. What time is it?.. Who are you?
The crash must be hard. As soon as he is stable we will take him to hospital.
Sir, can you tell me anything...? Can you tell me who was driving, or a color of the car?
Who...? What...?
Believe me. That makes no sense. He definitely has a concussion. Try to get info from the witness there.
That is all I have for you.
Hello Sir. I'm officer {0} of the {1}. Do you know what happened?
Hello. Yes, that is why I stopped and called 9-1-1?
Can you explain what happened?
The driver was on the wrong side of the road with a high rate of speed.
Do you remember the license plate of the
I do. It was
Thanks for your time and for stopping. Not everybody shows respect these days.
I appreciate hearing this from a police officer!
Hey Marcus, nice to see ya. What do we have here?
Hey {0}, it appears to be a Hit and Run.
Are there any injuries?
Yes. The truck driver ended up rolling his truck and got injured. He's currently getting help in the ambulance, and will most likely spend the night in the hospital.
Damn. Do you know what caused it?
The craftsman here told me that a guy overtook the truck at a high rate of speed, but feel free to ask him for yourself.
Okie Dokie.
That is all i have for you!
Hey Sir. Can you tell me exactly what you saw?
Yes, I can. Some idiot overtook the truck in the turn and I was also coming around. The truck swerved and ended up flipping, while I just hit the fence here.
Oh boy. Doesn't appear you have too much damage... Can you tell me anything about the vehicle and driver?
I'm not into cars, but the vehicle appeared to be a ~y~
Okay. What about the license plate? Did you see that?
I believe it was ~y~
Okay. Thanks for your help. Give this officer a statement and you will be free to leave.
Okay Officer. Thanks.
Sorry, but that's all I can tell you.
